correction: Remember: 1909 = Communal Electorate (Muslims). 1919 = Dyarchy in Provinces & Bicameralism at Center.

trap: Assuming Dyarchy meant the same thing at the same level.
correction: In 1919, Dyarchy was introduced in the PROVINCES. In 1935, Provincial Dyarchy was ABOLISHED, and Dyarchy was introduced at the CENTER.

trap: Thinking Article 19 is suspended during any emergency.
correction: Article 19 can ONLY be suspended when National Emergency is declared on grounds of 'War or External Aggression'. It CANNOT be suspended on grounds of 'Armed Rebellion' (internal emergency).

trap: Assuming all FRs apply only to citizens.
correction: Articles 15, 16, 19, 29, 30 are strictly for Indian Citizens. Art 14 (Equality), Art 21 (Life), Art 21A (Education) apply to BOTH citizens and foreigners.

trap: Confusing the writs of Mandamus and Prohibition.
correction: Mandamus tells a public official to 'DO' something (act). Prohibition tells a lower court 'NOT TO DO' something (stop acting).
